# checkpointsase_enhanced_tunnels (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "checkpointsase_enhanced_networks" "all" {}

# Tunnels attached to a single enhanced network.
data "checkpointsase_enhanced_tunnels" "first" {
  network_id = data.checkpointsase_enhanced_networks.all.networks[0].id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `network_id` (String) The ID of the enhanced network to retrieve tunnels for.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `items_total` (Number) The total number of tunnels in the enhanced network.
- `page` (Number) The current page number of the paginated result.
- `total_page` (Number) The total number of pages in the paginated result.
- `tunnels` (List of Object) The list of tunnels in the enhanced network. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tunnels))

<a id="nestedatt--tunnels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tunnels`

Read-Only:

- `auth_type` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `dpd_action` (String)
- `dpd_delay` (String)
- `dpd_timeout` (String)
- `ha_tunnel_id` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `ike_life_time` (String)
- `key_exchange` (String)
- `lifetime` (String)
- `p81_gateway_subnets` (List of String)
- `peak_bandwidth` (Number)
- `region_id` (String)
- `remote_gateway_subnets` (List of String)
- `remote_id` (String)
- `remote_public_ip` (String)
- `routing_type` (String)
- `tunnel_name` (String)
